overall.description: Cinematic game footage from Cyberpunk 2077 depicting a high-speed drive through a futuristic elevated highway corridor. The scene features immersive curved digital billboards lining the walls and transparent canopy overhead, displaying vibrant neon advertisements against a dark night sky with distant illuminated skyscrapers.

scene_state.functional_zone: futuristic elevated highway with immersive digital billboard tunnel

events.description: a vehicle with red taillights passes by on the right side at high speed

agents.ego_description: driving at high speed through the neon-lit highway corridor, maintaining a central position in the lane while approaching the distant city skyline

notable_agents.action: red vehicle overtaking on the right side, visible as a blur of red light

entered.detail: curved LED screen array displaying rotating advertisements and abstract patterns along the left wall
curved LED screen array displaying rotating advertisements and text graphics along the right wall
transparent overhead structure with integrated digital displays showing sky imagery and advertisements
tall illuminated skyscrapers with neon lighting visible in the distance through the transparent canopy
dark metal safety barrier running along the left edge of the roadway
dark metal safety barrier running along the right edge of the roadway

segments.scene_description: The camera moves steadily forward through a futuristic elevated highway corridor bathed in cyan and orange neon light from massive curved digital billboards lining both walls and the transparent overhead canopy. The asphalt road stretches ahead toward a distant neon-lit city skyline, while a vehicle briefly overtakes on the right. The environment is devoid of pedestrians, creating a sleek, cyberpunk atmosphere focused on high-speed transit through an immersive advertising tunnel.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a steady forward progression through a futuristic elevated highway corridor that transforms from an immersive advertising tunnel into an open vista of a neon city. It begins by gliding through a sleek transit corridor bathed in cyan and orange light, where massive curved digital billboards line the walls and the transparent overhead canopy. As the camera advances, the focus shifts toward the asphalt road stretching ahead, momentarily interrupted by a vehicle overtaking on the right. The scene then opens up as the enclosed feeling of the advertising tunnel gives way to a distant, illuminated skyline, finally revealing the sprawling neon-lit city under a dark night sky.
